_comment: Single source of truth for the browser force-install policy. Extension Guard reads this to lock every listed extension in place. Each extension needs, per browser, that browser's own store ID + update/install URL (a browser only force-installs from its own store). Leave a browser out, or as a REPLACE_* placeholder, and the guard skips it ('not configured' in `verify`). The installer/build scripts copy this file next to the binaries.
_autoUpdateComment: How the service reacts to a newer GitHub release: 'notify' (default) logs availability, 'apply' downloads + installs it silently, 'off' disables the periodic check. Keep at 'notify' until the binaries are code-signed. The status window's 'Update now' button and `guard update` work regardless of this setting.
